items.excerpt: Before the borehole, we walked hours for water that still made our children sick. Zahal changed that for our whole community.
items.name: Amina I.

items.excerpt: The skills training gave me the confidence and the tools to start my own small business and support my family.
items.name: Yusuf B.

items.excerpt: Volunteering with Zahal, I've seen first-hand how much a little support means to families who have so little.
items.name: Grace A.
